name: University of Miami

requirements.interview: Optional (alumni interviews available in select cities)
additional_materials: Optional arts portfolio for music, architecture, and visual arts applicants

special_considerations: Demonstrated interest is actively tracked — campus visits, virtual events, portal engagement, and contact with admissions are all considered
Early Decision I and II both offer a notable acceptance rate advantage over Regular Decision
Top programs in marine science, music, business (Herbert Business School), and pre-health draw highly specialized applicant pools
International student diversity valued; South Florida location and Latin American connections are part of institutional identity

financial_aid.notes: Need-aware admissions. Meets ~70% of demonstrated need on average. Significant merit aid including Stamps Scholarship (full ride).
